basics.name: Alexander Wansiedler
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
basics.summary: Accomplished Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 15 years of experience in software engineering, DevOps, and system architecture across digital media, finance, and IoT. Skilled in designing and implementing scalable CI/CD pipelines, with expertise in big data, zero-party data collection, and both frontend and backend systems.

summary: Accomplished Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 15 years of experience in software engineering, DevOps, and system architecture across digital media, finance, and IoT. Skilled in designing and implementing scalable CI/CD pipelines, with expertise in big data, zero-party data collection, and both frontend and backend systems.

work.name: Ippen Digital Media GmbH
work.summary: Lead development for zero-party data collection and big data applications, building scalable microservices, enhancing data pipelines, and integrating frontend frameworks.
highlights: Architected microservice backend and frontend systems, improving scalability
Backend: Transitioned from Django to FastAPI, Node.js with Express/Sequelize to Prisma; utilized ElasticSearch, S3, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, Apache Kafka, and Kubernetes on AWS
Frontend: Built and optimized applications using TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Chakra UI, with TDD

work.name: Lexx Software Co. Ltd.
work.position: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer / DevOps
work.summary: Developed and managed a high-concurrency crypto-trading platform supporting thousands of assets.
highlights: Backend: Developed using Golang, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis within Docker Swarm
Frontend: Led frontend team, transitioning from Angular (NgRx) to Vue.js (Vuex, Pinia)

work.name: esaveRus Ltd.
work.summary: Led the integration of Swiss IoT street lighting systems in Russia, managing cross-functional teams and technical documentation.
highlights: Oversaw hardware/software integration and deployment processes
Coordinated cross-functional teams and produced technical documentation

work.name: Intaro Software
work.summary: Developed e-commerce platforms and backend systems, including major projects for the Russian market.
highlights: Delivered Symfony/Django projects, enhancing e-commerce functionalities
Developed PostgreSQL module, improving data retrieval speeds by over 70%

education.summary: Specialization in Electronics and Automation of Physical Facilities
